case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., USA VS. ROBERT M DAMIR et al

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-07-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Patricia Abalos
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Bank of America
No appearance by the Defendant: Robert M. Damir
After hearing the testimony, declaration in lieu of live testimony filed 4/18/07, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $11,966.76
Prejudgment Interest $921.28
Attorney Fees 1,525.00
Costs $347.00, for a Total of $14,760.04
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2007 Set For Trial On May-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
